description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named s3fs-fuse CI that runs on every push, pull request, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has three jobs: Linux, macos10, and MemoryTest. The Linux job runs on multiple Linux containers, installs dependencies, builds, and runs tests. The macos10 job is currently disabled. The MemoryTest job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a fedora:38 container, installs dependencies, builds, and runs memory-related tests.
